# Pro Card Crafters

> Pro Card Crafters (procardcrafters.com) is a US print-on-demand service for custom business cards and marketing print. Premium finishes include gold foil stamping, deboss/emboss, epoxy 3D resin, matte/gloss coating, and Pantone spot color, printed on offset presses (Heidelberg / HP Indigo) at certified facilities and shipped worldwide via FedEx Express. Pricing is in USD with real-time exchange rates and volume discounts.

## What we make
- Business Cards — professional custom cards, multiple paper stocks and finishes
- Premium Business Cards — linen, pearl, and specialty stocks with premium finishes
- Stickers and Die-Cut Stickers — custom shapes and sizes
- Flyers, Brochures, Postcards, Posters, Banners

## Premium finishes
- Gold foil stamping
- Deboss / emboss
- Epoxy 3D resin (clear raised glossy spot accent)
- Matte / gloss coating
- Pantone spot color
- Rounded corners, die cut

## How it works
1. Choose a product and configure size, paper, quantity, and finish — price updates in real time (USD).
2. Upload your design (PDF recommended; AI and PSD accepted). Print readiness is auto-checked.
3. Pay via secure checkout (PayPal / card). Production starts immediately.
4. Receive your order. Standard production ~7–10 business days (Express skips 3 buffer days, +25%), then FedEx Express worldwide delivery.

## Facts
- Service area: United States and worldwide
- Print method: offset presses, CMYK + spot color
- File formats: PDF (recommended), AI, PSD
- Production: Standard ~7–10 business days; Express +25%
- Shipping: FedEx Express, door-to-door worldwide
- Pricing: USD, real-time FX, volume pricing, no hidden fees

## Notes
- Custom-printed products are generally non-refundable once completed; quality defects are reprinted or made right.
- All authority claims on this site are fact-based. Pro Card Crafters is a print-on-demand service producing at certified facilities; it does not claim to be a self-owned manufacturer.
